---
title: Emotion Regulation and Reward Network Deviations Associated With Suicidal and Non-Suicidal Self-Injury in First-Episode Psychosis
presenter: Cindy An
pres_group: presentations
date: '2026-05-01'
event: SOBP 2026
description: Cindy An, Seema Dhaher, Melissa Kilicoglu, Aubrey Moe, Mindy Westlund Schreiner, Jessica Turner
image: presentation.jpg
page-layout: full
---

![](presentation.jpg){width="100%" fig-align="center"}


![](SOBP_2026_crop.jpg){fig-align="center"}
